svg:
<title id="title>Cloud Services Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">Cloud failure modes: misconfiguration, quota exhaustion, vendor lock-in, and shared responsibility gaps
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="var(--bg-panel, #f8fafc)/>
Cloud Services: Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)">Common cloud pitfalls and how to avoid them
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">1. Misconfiguration (Most Common)
<text x="130 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Intended <text" x="130" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">Private bucket <text x="130 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#6ee7b7>IAM access only
<text x="220 y="168" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Typo!
<rect" x="245" y="150 width="160" height="55" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="325" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Actual (Public!) <text x="325 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>s3:PutObject * <text" x="325" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fca5a5">Principal: "*"
<text x="235 y="240" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Data breach from single config error! <text" x="235" y="260 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Manual config, no review process <text x="235 y="280" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: IaC, policy-as-code, automated scanning
<rect" x="460" y="85 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #f59e0b)" stroke-width="2/> 2. Quota Exhaustion
<rect" x="480" y="135 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #fffbeb)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #fcd34d)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="150 width="150" height="55" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="565" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Auto-Scaling <text x="565 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>Traffic spike! <text" x="565" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#6ee7b7">Need 50 instances
<line x1="645 y1="178" x2="675 y2="178" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Blocked!
<text x="760 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Quota Limit <text" x="760" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">Max: 20 instances <text x="760 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>Region limit hit
<text" x="665" y="240 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Can't scale during traffic spike! <text x="665 y="260" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Default quotas, no monitoring <text" x="665" y="280 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Monitor quota usage, request increases
<text x="235 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #8b5cf6">3. Vendor Lock-in
<text x="140 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Proprietary Services <text" x="140" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#c4b5fd">• Lambda + API Gateway <text x="140 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#c4b5fd>• DynamoDB streams
<text x="240 y="415" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Hard to migrate
<rect" x="265" y="395 width="145" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #f59e0b)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b45309)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="337" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Migration Cost <text x="337 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fcd34d>Complete rewrite <text" x="337" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fcd34d">High switching cost
<text x="235 y="495" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Trade-off: Velocity now vs flexibility later <text" x="235" y="515 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Abstraction layers, open standards where possible
<text x="665 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">4. Shared Responsibility Gap
<text x="570 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Provider <text" x="570" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">• Physical security <text x="570 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#6ee7b7>• Hardware, hypervisor
<text x="670 y="413" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Gap!
<rect" x="695" y="395 width="145" height="55" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #3b82f6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #1e40af)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="767" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Customer <text x="767 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#bfdbfe>• Data encryption <text" x="767" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#bfdbfe">• IAM policies
<text x="665 y="465" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>"Cloud provider will handle it" → Breach! <text x="665 y="485" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Unclear responsibility boundaries <text" x="665" y="505 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Document responsibilities, train teams
<marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)"/>
<marker id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)"/>
